scripts.predeploy: npm run build && cp public/CNAME dist/ && cp public/404.html dist/
scripts.deploy:manual: npm run predeploy && cd dist && rm -rf .git && git init && git checkout -b gh-pages && git remote add origin https://github.com/Daftitude/daftitude.git && git add . && git commit -m 'Manual deploy' && git push -f origin gh-pages && cd ..
